name: 權力徹底翻轉（奪取董事長之位）
description: 從被嘲笑的前科犯到掌控整個家族企業，女主完成了從谷底到巔峰的完整逆襲弧線。父親被自己一手培養的高管集體拋棄，權力的諷刺性轉移帶來極大的戲劇快感。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Bought a meeting to vote on electing Miss Fu as a new chairwoman. ... How dare you betray me? ... If it weren't for Miss Fu, we'd never have gotten our chance.
